## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Diligent and GrowthX to discuss content performance, reporting, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/AkMBqqaAL7ZT9Y7zmQGxpMSV43pvp2s9?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance shows positive trends, with increases in sessions and engagement rates across updated/new pieces](https://fathom.video/share/AkMBqqaAL7ZT9Y7zmQGxpMSV43pvp2s9?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Monthly performance reports will be provided, with weekly check-ins for quick insights](https://fathom.video/share/AkMBqqaAL7ZT9Y7zmQGxpMSV43pvp2s9?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [Diligent to send ERM keyword bank and case studies to feed into GrowthX's AI content creation tool](https://fathom.video/share/AkMBqqaAL7ZT9Y7zmQGxpMSV43pvp2s9?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [7 content pieces in review, 5 more in progress; product matching update expected Friday](https://fathom.video/share/AkMBqqaAL7ZT9Y7zmQGxpMSV43pvp2s9?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Positive trends in sessions and engagement rates for updated/new content](https://fathom.video/share/AkMBqqaAL7ZT9Y7zmQGxpMSV43pvp2s9?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)
  - [Corporate Governance piece performing well, showcasing success of SME-led content](https://fathom.video/share/AkMBqqaAL7ZT9Y7zmQGxpMSV43pvp2s9?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [Deregulation pieces bringing good traffic; Diligent positioned as trustworthy source](https://fathom.video/share/AkMBqqaAL7ZT9Y7zmQGxpMSV43pvp2s9?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [Increase in queries ranking in first position](https://fathom.video/share/AkMBqqaAL7ZT9Y7zmQGxpMSV43pvp2s9?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Google Search Console Update

  - [Google stopped displaying results beyond position 100](https://fathom.video/share/AkMBqqaAL7ZT9Y7zmQGxpMSV43pvp2s9?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [May cause decrease in impressions for lower-ranking terms](https://fathom.video/share/AkMBqqaAL7ZT9Y7zmQGxpMSV43pvp2s9?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [Queries for positions 1-10 remain stable](https://fathom.video/share/AkMBqqaAL7ZT9Y7zmQGxpMSV43pvp2s9?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
